mapper.sql: select result_id, apply_id, result_type, item_type, item_code, item_name, result_value, result_unit, reference_range, abnormal_flag, image_url, image_find, diagnosis_opinion, diagnosis_result, suggestion, sort, status, doctor_id, report_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from exam_result

select ea.apply_id as applyId, ea.apply_type as applyType, ea.tech_id as techId, ea.patient_id as patientId, ea.doctor_id as doctorId, p.name as patientName, mt.tech_code as techCode, mt.tech_name as techName, ea.apply_status as applyStatus, ea.pay_status as payStatus, ea.apply_time as applyTime from exam_apply ea left join patient p on ea.patient_id = p.patient_id left join medical_technology mt on ea.tech_id = mt.id
mapper.select: where ea.apply_type in ('CHECK', 'INSPEC', 'LAB') order by ea.apply_time desc, ea.apply_id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into exam_result
apply_id, result_type, item_type, item_code, item_name, result_value, result_unit, reference_range, abnormal_flag, image_url, image_find, diagnosis_opinion, diagnosis_result, suggestion, sort, status, doctor_id, report_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{applyId}, #{resultType}, #{itemType}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{resultValue}, #{resultUnit}, #{referenceRange}, #{abnormalFlag}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageFind}, #{diagnosisOpinion}, #{diagnosisResult}, #{suggestion}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{doctorId}, #{reportTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.update: update exam_result set apply_id = #{applyId}, result_type = #{resultType}, item_type = #{itemType}, item_code = #{itemCode}, item_name = #{itemName}, result_value = #{resultValue}, result_unit = #{resultUnit}, reference_range = #{referenceRange}, abnormal_flag = #{abnormalFlag}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_find = #{imageFind}, diagnosis_opinion = #{diagnosisOpinion}, diagnosis_result = #{diagnosisResult}, suggestion = #{suggestion}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, doctor_id = #{doctorId}, report_time = #{reportTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where result_id = #{resultId}
mapper.delete:
delete from exam_result where result_id in
#{resultId}
